verify_queries.counts: select (select count(*) from public.memory_documents) as documents, (select count(*) from public.memory_chunks) as chunks;
verify_queries.document: select source_path from public.memory_documents where source_path = 'MEMORY.md';
verify_queries.chunk: select d.source_path, c.chunk_index from public.memory_chunks c join public.memory_documents d on d.id = c.document_id where d.source_path = 'MEMORY.md' and c.chunk_index = 1;
